caption: This video displays a static presentation slide from a "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" course. The slide is titled "Tutorial – 4" and presents a physics or engineering problem stating, "For the conditions specified in Tutorial 2 for the Linde – Hampson system with Nitrogen as working fluid, calculate the following when the effectiveness of HX is 90%." The top and bottom margins of the slide are dark blue banners; the top banner contains the course title, while the bottom banner identifies the instructor as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay." An NPTEL logo, featuring a stylized circular emblem and the letters "NPTEL," is positioned in the lower-left corner. Across all frames, the content remains identical and unchanging, indicating that the video is paused or showing a still image of the instructional material.
